title: The Keeper's Tower

features.name: sentinel tower
features.desc-on-touch: You climb the spiral, each lamp-glass casting its own archive of light. The tower knows what it holds before you ask.

features.name: lens platform
features.desc-on-touch: You stand on the observation ring. Below: the archive reading itself in the water. Above: the sky, also reading.

features.name: light-archive
features.desc-on-touch: Files are suspended in the beam. Each one casts its own shadow-duplicate on the opposite wall.

features.name: keeper's desk
features.desc-on-touch: The log is written in a hand that changes year to year. This year it says: 'Still counting. Still remembering which file belongs in which beam.'

features.name: fence-line margin
features.desc-on-touch: The orchard rows blur into distance. Each stake marks a file that needs reading. Some stakes point backward, toward files already kept.

inscription: the keeper doesn't know if she's tending the archive or the archive is tending her

file.name: Keeper_Maintenance_Log_Years_1-8.txt
file.note: Handwritten maintenance schedules, increasingly difficult to distinguish from archive growth notes. Latest entry is two years old.

exits.label: back down the dunes, where the foam returns the words you read
along the lighthouse-edge, toward a reef that reads like filed text
exits.to: NEW: the tidal library where navigation charts become testimony

exits.label: into the interior light-chamber, where all beams converge to one word
into the lens-room itself, where the light is coming from inside you
